* fix: PR #120 レビュー指摘対応 + テスタビリティ向上

- BuildRedirectUri: trailing slash を追加 (HttpListener.Prefix と一致)
- listener.Stop() → listener.Close() (リソースリーク修正)
- 認可 URL ログから state を除去 (セキュリティ: AuthorizeEndpoint のみ記録)
- RefreshTokenAsync/ExchangeCodeAsync: response を using var で確実 Dispose
- ParseCallbackQuery を internal static 純関数として抽出 (テスタビリティ向上)
- DropboxStorageProvider: ICredentialStore 全メソッドへ CancellationToken 伝播

- RefreshTokenAsync/ExchangeCodeAsync: body 変数をログに含めて未使用警告を解消

feat(research): dual-timescale architecture & split-loss therapy deconfounding (EXP-1831–1848)

EXP-1831–1838: Dual-timescale architecture experiments
- UAM + slow features are REDUNDANT (overlapping information)
- Raw features win at ALL horizons (1h–24h)
- Metabolic context IS highly predictable (hypo_recovery AUC=0.946)
- ISF largely unexplained (cross-val R²=-0.16)
- Combined best-of-breed improves 10/11 patients

EXP-1841–1848: Split-loss therapy deconfounding
- Supply and demand want DIFFERENT optimal ISF (disagreement 0.32×)
- Supply/demand AGREE on CR (disagreement 0.09×)
- AID loop inflates supply loss, reduces demand loss (asymmetric)
- Split-loss captures 97% of exhaustive grid-search optimization
- 8/11 patients: CR is the most-wrong parameter
- ISF scale estimates are temporally stable (Δ=0.15)
- Bug fix: EXP-1842 NaN handling for drift_zero_scale

2 experiment scripts, 2 reports, 16 figures

commit.message:
Enable surrogate pair range tests in character classes (#149)

* Add \\uhhhh unicode escape support to parser

Parse \\uhhhh (exactly 4 hex digits) in regex patterns, matching JDK
behavior. When a high surrogate is followed by a \\uhhhh low surrogate,
they are combined into a single supplementary code point.

Fixes #133

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add inline flags (?d) and (?u); fix (?U) to mean UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS

Add (?d) for UNIX_LINES and (?u) for UNICODE_CASE inline flags.
Remap (?U) from RE2's NON_GREEDY to JDK's UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS,
which enables both UNICODE_GROUPS and UNICODE_CHAR_CLASS.

Fixes #134

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches

countRepeat was compounding repeat counts across alternation branches
sequentially, treating them as if all branches were visited. For
ALTERNATE nodes, only one branch is taken at match time, so only the
worst-case (most expensive) branch should be considered.

Fixes #135

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Make Unicode property name lookup loose per UTS#18

Property name lookups now ignore case, underscores, hyphens, and spaces,
matching JDK behavior and UTS#18 requirements. Both binary properties
and script/category names use the same normalization. For example,
\p{IsWhiteSpace} now matches \p{IsWhite_Space}.

Fixes #136

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Accept \b{g} grapheme cluster boundary syntax

Parse \b{g} without error for JDK compatibility. Currently approximated
as an empty match (matches at every position) since full UAX#29 boundary
detection is not yet implemented.

Fixes #137

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix three-digit octal escape \0nnn parsing

The \0 escape now consumes up to three octal digits (max value 0377),
matching JDK behavior. Previously only two digits were consumed, so
\0101 was parsed as \010 + literal '1' instead of octal 101 (= 'A').

Fixes #138

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Implement character class intersection/subtraction (&&)

Add support for the && operator inside character classes, matching JDK
behavior. [a-z&&[def]] now correctly matches only d/e/f, and
[a-z&&[^bc]] correctly excludes b and c.

Added CharClassBuilder.intersect() for computing the intersection of
two character classes using a merge of sorted range sets.

Fixes #139

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Enable surrogate pair range tests in character classes

The \uhhhh surrogate pair combination added in #133 already handles
surrogate pair ranges in character classes correctly. The \u escape
parser combines high+low surrogate pairs into supplementary code points,
so [\uD800\uDC00-\uDBFF\uDFFF] is correctly parsed as [U+10000-U+10FFFF].

Fixes #140

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix three-digit octal escape \\0nnn parsing (#147)

* Add \\uhhhh unicode escape support to parser

Parse \\uhhhh (exactly 4 hex digits) in regex patterns, matching JDK
behavior. When a high surrogate is followed by a \\uhhhh low surrogate,
they are combined into a single supplementary code point.

Fixes #133

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add inline flags (?d) and (?u); fix (?U) to mean UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS

Add (?d) for UNIX_LINES and (?u) for UNICODE_CASE inline flags.
Remap (?U) from RE2's NON_GREEDY to JDK's UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS,
which enables both UNICODE_GROUPS and UNICODE_CHAR_CLASS.

Fixes #134

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches

countRepeat was compounding repeat counts across alternation branches
sequentially, treating them as if all branches were visited. For
ALTERNATE nodes, only one branch is taken at match time, so only the
worst-case (most expensive) branch should be considered.

Fixes #135

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Make Unicode property name lookup loose per UTS#18

Property name lookups now ignore case, underscores, hyphens, and spaces,
matching JDK behavior and UTS#18 requirements. Both binary properties
and script/category names use the same normalization. For example,
\p{IsWhiteSpace} now matches \p{IsWhite_Space}.

Fixes #136

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Accept \b{g} grapheme cluster boundary syntax

Parse \b{g} without error for JDK compatibility. Currently approximated
as an empty match (matches at every position) since full UAX#29 boundary
detection is not yet implemented.

Fixes #137

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix three-digit octal escape \0nnn parsing

The \0 escape now consumes up to three octal digits (max value 0377),
matching JDK behavior. Previously only two digits were consumed, so
\0101 was parsed as \010 + literal '1' instead of octal 101 (= 'A').

Fixes #138

[fix](be) Restore workload group limit refresh after memory recovery (#62070)

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: 
1. Refresh_workload_group_memory_state() returned early when aggregate
workload-group memory usage was zero. That skipped
update_queries_limit_(), so per-query memory limits could stay
artificially low after memory pressure had already eased.
2. Paused workload queries were not handled correctly around recent
query cancellation. The manager could return too early, fail to clear
resumed or expired paused entries, and skip restoring effective query
memory limits under recovery. This change fixes those branches and adds
unit tests that directly cover the recent-cancel and Phase 3 cleanup
paths.

fix: correct OS detection and BTRFS disk pressure for GDX/HWE builds

lib.sh: For chained builds (GDX, HWE), BASE_IMAGE env var reflects the
intermediate TunaOS stage image (e.g. ghcr.io/tuna-os/yellowfin:gnome50)
because Containerfile sets ENV BASE_IMAGE=${BASE_IMAGE} from the build arg.
This caused IS_ALMALINUXKITTEN to be false for gnome50-gdx, sending it down
the wrong NVIDIA install path (akmods with a mismatched kernel).

Fix: read BASE_IMAGE from image-info.json written by the previous stage when
present. That file records the true OS base (e.g. almalinux-bootc:10-kitten)
set during stage 1, giving correct OS detection for all downstream stages.
Fall back to env/os-release only when image-info.json doesn't exist yet.

Also fix a typo in print_debug_info (wrong image-info.json path).

Justfile: Replace targeted podman rmi calls with podman system prune -af.
Removing only pre-chunk + chain base leaves akmods multi-stage FROM images
in BTRFS, which still causes disk pressure and the 'image not known' bug.
Containerfile.final only needs the rechunked archive loaded next, so pruning
everything at this point is safe and fully clears the BTRFS volume.

EXP-1901: Retrospective validation of settings recommendations

5-experiment series validating that natural-experiment-derived pump
settings (ISF, basal, CR) from training data predict glucose outcomes
on held-out verification days (every 10th day, 18 days/patient).

Key findings (11 patients, 1,838 patient-days):
- EXP-1901: ISF concordance train↔verify = 0.849 ± 0.121 (8/11 > 0.8)
- EXP-1903: ISF temporal CV = 4.6% (stable, excluding outlier k)
- EXP-1905: Within-patient mismatch→TIR r = -0.371, p = 0.0007
  (higher mismatch windows have worse TIR within each patient)
- EXP-1907: 5-fold CV ISF stability = 4.8% (9/11 stable)
- EXP-1909: Train→verify TIR r = 0.973 (glucose control is stable trait)

Simpson's paradox: Population mismatch→TIR is positive (+0.186) because
AID compensates cross-patient, but within-patient effect is consistently
negative (8/10 patients). Fisher z-transform properly resolves this.

Production integration:
- Added temporal_stability_cv and validation_note to SettingsOptimizationResult
- ISF period-spread CV flags instability (>15% triggers warning)
- Validation note contextualizes recommendations with EXP-1901 evidence
- All 106 production tests pass

Artifacts: exp_clinical_1901.py, report, fig66-fig70, results JSON.

commit.message:
Fix A2: add revoke_write_status for switchover write revocation

Add RevokeWriteStatus RPC to the control plane. The switchover now
revokes write status on the old primary BEFORE fencing secondaries,
matching SF's SwapPrimary Phase 0 (Demote).

New writes are immediately rejected (ReconfigurationPending) via the
existing fast-path check in replicate(). In-flight writes continue
to completion and are failed by demotion's fail_all().

Changes:
- Proto: RevokeWriteStatus RPC + request/response messages
- ReplicaHandle trait: revoke_write_status() method
- GrpcReplicaHandle, InProcessReplicaHandle, PodRuntime, ControlServer
- switchover(): calls revoke_write_status() as step 1
- Test: concurrent writer during driver.switchover() checks for
  ReconfigurationPending errors — confirmed test fails without fix

commit.message:
Replace fragmented ScpDriver bookkeeping with QuorumSetTracker and TxSetTracker

Extract seven DashMap fields from ScpDriver into two typed state machines:
- QuorumSetTracker: manages by_node, by_hash, pending, and local qset state
- TxSetTracker: manages tx_set cache, pending requests, and validity cache

All ScpDriver methods now delegate to the appropriate tracker, reducing the
public API surface and consolidating cleanup/lifecycle invariants.

Includes 27 unit tests across both trackers covering all API methods,
edge cases, and cleanup semantics.

Closes #1209

Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches (#144)

* Add \\uhhhh unicode escape support to parser

Parse \\uhhhh (exactly 4 hex digits) in regex patterns, matching JDK
behavior. When a high surrogate is followed by a \\uhhhh low surrogate,
they are combined into a single supplementary code point.

Fixes #133

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add inline flags (?d) and (?u); fix (?U) to mean UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS

Add (?d) for UNIX_LINES and (?u) for UNICODE_CASE inline flags.
Remap (?U) from RE2's NON_GREEDY to JDK's UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS,
which enables both UNICODE_GROUPS and UNICODE_CHAR_CLASS.

Fixes #134

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches

countRepeat was compounding repeat counts across alternation branches
sequentially, treating them as if all branches were visited. For
ALTERNATE nodes, only one branch is taken at match time, so only the
worst-case (most expensive) branch should be considered.

Fixes #135

fix(vite): force host 127.0.0.1 to prevent IPv6-only binding causing 502

Tailscale Serve forwards to http://127.0.0.1:19147 (IPv4) → connection refused → 502.

Fix: add server.host: '127.0.0.1' in vite.config.ts to guarantee IPv4 binding.
